eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Juab, UT; at 9:36 AM on JUN 21, 2026 Effective until 9:36 AM JUN 22, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Juab County Emergency Management has issued an evacuation order for Eureka due to the Iron Fire. This is a GO order. Leave immediately by the designated route. Do not stop to gather belongings. Conditions are life-threatening and changing rapidly. Shelters are open at the LDS chapel in Elberta. If you cannot leave, call 911. Leave immediately by the designated route. Do not stop to gather belongings. Shelters: LDS chapel in Elberta. If you cannot leave, call 911.
